'''鈭歵h-th-y''' ('''thathaya''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:impact|impact]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-th-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:impact|impact]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵h-th-y
|-
! Lemma
| thathaya
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thathayithi|thathayithi]] || [[word:thathayiji|thathayiji]] || [[word:thathayishi|thathayishi]] || [[word:thathayi|thathayi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathayuthuth|thathayuthuth]] || [[word:thathayujuj|thathayujuj]] || [[word:thathayushush|thathayushush]] || [[word:thathay|thathay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thathayuthu|thathayuthu]] || [[word:thathayuju|thathayuju]] || [[word:thathayushu|thathayushu]] || [[word:thathayu|thathayu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thathayufuth|thathayufuth]] || [[word:thathayufuj|thathayufuj]] || [[word:thathayufush|thathayufush]] || [[word:thathayuf|thathayuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thathayethe|thathayethe]] || [[word:thathayeje|thathayeje]] || [[word:thathayeshe|thathayeshe]] || [[word:thathaye|thathaye]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathayothoth|thathayothoth]] || [[word:thathayojoj|thathayojoj]] || [[word:thathayoshosh|thathayoshosh]] || [[word:thathay|thathay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thathayotho|thathayotho]] || [[word:thathayojo|thathayojo]] || [[word:thathayosho|thathayosho]] || [[word:thathayo|thathayo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thathayofoth|thathayofoth]] || [[word:thathayofoj|thathayofoj]] || [[word:thathayofosh|thathayofosh]] || [[word:thathayof|thathayof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thathay忙th忙|thathay忙th忙]] || [[word:thathay忙j忙|thathay忙j忙]] || [[word:thathay忙sh忙|thathay忙sh忙]] || [[word:thathay忙|thathay忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathayathath|thathayathath]] || [[word:thathayajaj|thathayajaj]] || [[word:thathayashash|thathayashash]] || [[word:thathay|thathay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thathayatha|thathayatha]] || [[word:thathayaja|thathayaja]] || [[word:thathayasha|thathayasha]] || [[word:thathaya|thathaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thathayafath|thathayafath]] || [[word:thathayafaj|thathayafaj]] || [[word:thathayafash|thathayafash]] || [[word:thathayaf|thathayaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:thathayasha|thathayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gothathayasha|gothathayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokithathayasha|gokithathayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:thathayn眉sha|thathayn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gothathaynkn眉sha|gothathaynkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokithathayn眉sha|gokithathayn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thathaysh毛sha|thathaysh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothathaynksh毛sha|gothathaynksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithathaysh毛sha|gokithathaysh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thathayrosha|thathayrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothathaynkrosha|gothathaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithathayrosha|gokithathayrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thathaymusha|thathaymusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gothathaynkmusha|gothathaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithathaymusha|gokithathaymusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:thathaysherasha|thathaysherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gothathaynksherasha|gothathaynksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokithathaysherasha|gokithathaysherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:thathayngasha|thathayngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gothathaynkngasha|gothathaynkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokithathayngasha|gokithathayngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thathayasha|thathayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gothathaynkyasha|gothathaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokithathayasha|gokithathayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:thathayamasha|thathayamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gothathaynkyamasha|gothathaynkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokithathayamasha|gokithathayamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:thathayn眉sh毛sha|thathayn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gothathaynkn眉sh毛sha|gothathaynkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokithathayn眉sh毛sha|gokithathayn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:thathayn眉rosha|thathayn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothathaynkn眉rosha|gothathaynkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithathayn眉rosha|gokithathayn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thathayn眉musha|thathayn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothathaynkn眉musha|gothathaynkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithathayn眉musha|gokithathayn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:thathaysh毛n眉sha|thathaysh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gothathaynksh毛n眉sha|gothathaynksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokithathaysh毛n眉sha|gokithathaysh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:thathaysh毛rosha|thathaysh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothathaynksh毛rosha|gothathaynksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithathaysh毛rosha|gokithathaysh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thathaysh毛musha|thathaysh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothathaynksh毛musha|gothathaynksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithathaysh毛musha|gokithathaysh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:thathayron眉sha|thathayron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gothathaynkron眉sha|gothathaynkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokithathayron眉sha|gokithathayron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:thathayrosh毛sha|thathayrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gothathaynkrosh毛sha|gothathaynkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokithathayrosh毛sha|gokithathayrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thathayromusha|thathayromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothathaynkromusha|gothathaynkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithathayromusha|gokithathayromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:thathaymun眉sha|thathaymun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gothathaynkmun眉sha|gothathaynkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokithathaymun眉sha|gokithathaymun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:thathaymush毛sha|thathaymush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gothathaynkmush毛sha|gothathaynkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokithathaymush毛sha|gokithathaymush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:thathaymurosha|thathaymurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothathaynkmurosha|gothathaynkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithathaymurosha|gokithathaymurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:thathay|thathay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:th忙th忙y|th忙th忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hothathay|hothathay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoth忙th忙y|hoth忙th忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohothathay|hohothathay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoth忙th忙y|hohoth忙th忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉thathay|n眉thathay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉th忙th忙y|n眉th忙th忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉thathay|n眉n眉thathay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉th忙th忙y|n眉n眉th忙th忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂thathay|n茂thathay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂th忙th忙y|n茂th忙th忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂thathay|n茂n茂thathay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂th忙th忙y|n茂n茂th忙th忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luthathay|luthathay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luth忙th忙y|luth忙th忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluthathay|luluthathay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluth忙th忙y|luluth忙th忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lithathay|lithathay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lith忙th忙y|lith忙th忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilithathay|lilithathay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilith忙th忙y|lilith忙th忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kothathay|kothathay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koth忙th忙y|koth忙th忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokothathay|kokothathay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoth忙th忙y|kokoth忙th忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kethathay|kethathay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keth忙th忙y|keth忙th忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekethathay|kekethathay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:keketh忙th忙y|keketh忙th忙y]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
